zh: 第三文化小孩，指在父母文化之外成長的孩子。
en: She identifies as a third-culture kid, having grown up outside her parents' culture.
en_example: She identifies as a third-culture kid, having grown up outside her parents' culture.
zh_example: She identifies as a third-culture kid, having grown up outside her parents' culture.
ja: サードカルチャーキッズ。親の文化以外の環境で育った子供を指す。
ja_example: She identifies as a third-culture kid, having grown up outside her parents' culture.

zh: 雙語能力，能說兩種語言的能力。
en: Bilingualism can improve cognitive abilities and empathy.
en_example: Bilingualism can improve cognitive abilities and empathy.
zh_example: Bilingualism can improve cognitive abilities and empathy.
ja: バイリンガリズム。二つの言語を話す能力。
ja_example: Bilingualism can improve cognitive abilities and empathy.

zh: 身份認同危機，對自我身份感到困惑的狀態。
en: Many third-culture kids experience an identity crisis during adolescence.
en_example: Many third-culture kids experience an identity crisis during adolescence.
zh_example: Many third-culture kids experience an identity crisis during adolescence.
ja: アイデンティティクライシス。自己のアイデンティティに混乱を感じる状態。
ja_example: Many third-culture kids experience an identity crisis during adolescence.

zh: 形成期，指人生中重要的成長階段。
en: The formative years of childhood shape a person's personality.
en_example: The formative years of childhood shape a person's personality.
zh_example: The formative years of childhood shape a person's personality.
ja: 形成期。人生の重要な成長段階を指す。
ja_example: The formative years of childhood shape a person's personality.

zh: 同理心，理解並感受他人情感的能力。
en: Learning multiple languages can increase empathy towards others.
en_example: Learning multiple languages can increase empathy towards others.
zh_example: Learning multiple languages can increase empathy towards others.
ja: 共感。他人の感情を理解し感じ取る能力。
ja_example: Learning multiple languages can increase empathy towards others.

zh: 認知益處，指對大腦思考、記憶等功能的正面影響。
en: Bilingualism provides cognitive benefits such as improved memory and attention.
en_example: Bilingualism provides cognitive benefits such as improved memory and attention.
zh_example: Bilingualism provides cognitive benefits such as improved memory and attention.
ja: 認知的利益。記憶や注意力など脳の機能に良い影響を与えること。
ja_example: Bilingualism provides cognitive benefits such as improved memory and attention.

zh: 國際學校，使用多國語言教學的學校。
en: She attended an international school where English was the main language.
en_example: She attended an international school where English was the main language.
zh_example: She attended an international school where English was the main language.
ja: インターナショナルスクール。多言語で教育を行う学校。
ja_example: She attended an international school where English was the main language.

zh: 當地環境，指本地的文化和生活圈。
en: He was immersed in the local scene, enjoying local music and culture.
en_example: He was immersed in the local scene, enjoying local music and culture.
zh_example: He was immersed in the local scene, enjoying local music and culture.
ja: 地元の環境。現地の文化や生活圏を指す。
ja_example: He was immersed in the local scene, enjoying local music and culture.

zh: 自信，對自己能力和價值的信任。
en: Constant questioning of identity can affect one's self-confidence.
en_example: Constant questioning of identity can affect one's self-confidence.
zh_example: Constant questioning of identity can affect one's self-confidence.
ja: 自信。自分の能力や価値を信じること。
ja_example: Constant questioning of identity can affect one's self-confidence.

zh: 文化經驗，個人或群體在文化背景下的生活體驗。
en: Sharing cultural experiences helps people understand each other better.
en_example: Sharing cultural experiences helps people understand each other better.
zh_example: Sharing cultural experiences helps people understand each other better.
ja: 文化体験。個人や集団が文化的背景の中で経験すること。
ja_example: Sharing cultural experiences helps people understand each other better.

zh: 多語能力，能說多種語言的能力。
en: Multilingualism enhances brain function and creativity.
en_example: Multilingualism enhances brain function and creativity.
zh_example: Multilingualism enhances brain function and creativity.
ja: 多言語能力。複数の言語を話す能力。
ja_example: Multilingualism enhances brain function and creativity.

zh: 注意力測試，用來評估專注力的測驗。
en: The study included attention tests to measure cognitive focus.
en_example: The study included attention tests to measure cognitive focus.
zh_example: The study included attention tests to measure cognitive focus.
ja: 注意力テスト。集中力を測るための検査。
ja_example: The study included attention tests to measure cognitive focus.

zh: 認知益處，指對思考和記憶等腦功能的正面影響。
en: Learning a second language has cognitive benefits like improved memory.
en_example: Learning a second language has cognitive benefits like improved memory.
zh_example: Learning a second language has cognitive benefits like improved memory.
ja: 認知的利益。思考や記憶など脳の機能に良い影響を与えること。
ja_example: Learning a second language has cognitive benefits like improved memory.

zh: 過山車般的旅程，比喻情緒或經歷起伏不定。
en: Her self-discovery was a roller coaster journey with many ups and downs.
en_example: Her self-discovery was a roller coaster journey with many ups and downs.
zh_example: Her self-discovery was a roller coaster journey with many ups and downs.
ja: ジェットコースターの旅。感情や経験の浮き沈みを比喩する。
ja_example: Her self-discovery was a roller coaster journey with many ups and downs.

zh: 自我探索，了解自我內心和身份的過程。
en: Self-discovery is an important part of growing up.
en_example: Self-discovery is an important part of growing up.
zh_example: Self-discovery is an important part of growing up.
ja: 自己発見。自分の内面やアイデンティティを理解する過程。
ja_example: Self-discovery is an important part of growing up.
